title: dactylorhiza traunsteineri subsp. schurii
intro: Dactylorhiza traunsteineri subsp. schurii is a subspecies of orchid native to Europe, characterized by its distinctive purple flowers with a yellow center. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza traunsteineri subsp. schurii are thought to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
